rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `fiberHomeomorph` uses bare `simp [...]` while every other proof in the file uses `simp only`/`simpa only`, relying implicitly on the default simp set for `Set.mem_singleton_iff`; acting on it makes the proof robust and consistent. Review 2 misses this genuine inconsistency, incorrectly characterizing all proofs as using targeted simp.
